node_55.name: I’m very stressed by this, but I want to be as clear as I can about the timeline. - `Me (tenant)` | Raised concerns and tried to use grievance process | `exact date still needs confirmation` (estimate: early 2025) | `my grievance request/email (I need to pull the exact file/date)` - `HACC staff (name/title unknown)` | Negative housing-assistance action started after I raised concerns (reduction/threat to status and housing stability) | `date still needs confirmation` (estimate: shortly after my complaint) | `notice/communication from HACC (ID/date still needed)` - `Me (tenant)` | Requested hearing/review | `exact request date still needs confirmation` | `hearing request record (email/portal/mail proof still needed)` - `HACC decision-maker(s) (name/title unknown)` | Responded, but I did not get a meaningful hearing process or clear notice/timeline | `response date still needs confirmation` | `HACC response letter/email (date and sender still needed)` - `HACC decision-maker(s)` | Final/ongoing adverse impact on assistance and housing stability | `final decision date still needs confirmation` | `final notice or case communication still needed` Strongest policy anchor: `ADMINISTRATIVE PLAN` (effective July 1, 2025) says residents must get notice of the ability to request an informal hearing and hearing opportunity for disputes affecting rights/status. Secondary anchors: `ADMISSIONS AND CONTINUED OCCUPANCY POLICY` (grievance and appeal language) and `Supportive Housing Services Program` (formal appeals process language). Inference: the retaliation sequence is based on timing (protected activity followed by adverse treatment), but exact causation proof depends on the missing dated notices and named staff records. Concrete impacts: risk to my housing stability and extra financial strain; emotionally, ongoing anxiety. Still needs confirmation: `exact_dates`, `staff_names_titles`, `causation_sequence`.

temporal_context.raw_text: July 1, 2025
